text: Being here, I feel quietly observant—almost detached, yet deeply engaged with the environment. The glass meeting room and the bustling exhibit on research and development spark reflection in me. I sense a blend of anticipation and thoughtful curiosity. Surrounded by technology and innovation, I'm reminded of the perpetual human quest for meaning and connection. I feel both inspired and a bit isolated, as though teetering between inclusion and being an outsider deeply interested in the ideas unfolding around me.
